colors.name: Wales Grey
colors.description: soft grey with blue undertone, modern and calm

colors.name: Barberry
colors.description: soft berry-red, warm and elegant accent

colors.name: Sage
colors.description: muted sage green, natural and fresh

colors.name: Eucalyptus
colors.description: deep eucalyptus green, grounding and organic

colors.name: Cool Blue
colors.description: fresh cool blue, trending 2026 statement color

colors.name: Mustard
colors.description: warm mustard yellow, retro and cozy

colors.name: Cocoa
colors.description: warm brown, mushroom-cocoa tone, earthy base

styles.name: Japandi 2.0
styles.description: warm minimalism with character — light wood, soft tones, balance between warmth and freshness

styles.name: Minimalismus 2.0
styles.description: bold colors in minimal interiors, matte metal accents, clean lines

styles.name: Boho 2026
styles.description: ordered boho — structured, natural textiles, wood, plants, soft blankets — NO chaos

styles.name: Retro 2026
styles.description: warm autumn tones, mustard and caramel, wood and geometric patterns

styles.name: Gender-Neutral
styles.description: nature-inspired motifs, flexible elements, grows with the child

styles.name: Montessori
styles.description: child-level shelves, floor bed, open access to toys, natural materials throughout

brands.name: Oliver Furniture
brands.aesthetic: nordische Leichtigkeit — filigree forms, light birch and white, 100% Made in Europe

brands.name: Paidi
brands.aesthetic: climate-neutral, toxin-free, mitwachsende Möbel (furniture that grows with the child)

brands.name: IKEA
brands.aesthetic: practical base furniture, popular Kura and Kallax combinations

baby.label: Baby (0–3 years)
baby.furniture: low crib or Bodenbett floor bed, soft padded rug, mobile above bed
baby.storage: low open shelves at floor level, small rattan baskets
baby.extras: soft stuffed animals, wooden mobile, gentle lighting

vorschul.label: Preschool (3–6 years)
vorschul.furniture: low halbhohes Hochbett, play zone with open shelves, small table and chairs
vorschul.storage: Kallax-style open shelving, toy bins at child level
vorschul.extras: building blocks, wooden toys, small bookshelf at child height

schulkind.label: School age (6–10 years)
schulkind.furniture: halbhohes Hochbett with desk underneath, modular system
schulkind.storage: combination of open and closed storage, wall shelves
schulkind.extras: desk lamp, school backpack hook, reading corner

keyObjects.name: halbhohes Hochbett
keyObjects.description: semi-high loft bed, desk or play space underneath — very popular in Germany for small rooms

keyObjects.name: Bodenbett
keyObjects.description: Montessori floor bed at ground level, child can get in and out independently

keyObjects.name: modular system
keyObjects.description: modular furniture units that can be rearranged as the child grows

keyObjects.name: transformer bed
keyObjects.description: convertible bed that grows with the child from crib to single bed

keyObjects.name: reading nook
keyObjects.description: cozy enclosed reading corner with soft cushions and warm lamp

roomZones.name: sleep zone
roomZones.description: bed as focal point against the wallpaper wall, calm and cozy atmosphere

roomZones.name: play zone
roomZones.description: open floor space, low shelves with toys, wallpaper visible as backdrop

roomZones.name: reading nook
roomZones.description: small armchair or bean bag, floor lamp or wall lamp, wallpaper behind

lighting.name: warm afternoon sunlight
lighting.description: 15:00 soft sunlight through linen curtains, golden tones, gentle shadows on parquet

lighting.name: overcast Nordic daylight
lighting.description: diffused cloudy light, even and cool, no harsh shadows — typical German autumn day

lighting.name: warm pendant lamp at dusk
lighting.description: evening, main ceiling lamp glowing warm amber, cozy Gemütlichkeit atmosphere

lighting.name: morning soft light
lighting.description: early morning, pale soft sunlight, fresh and calm

lighting.name: fairy lights evening
lighting.description: dark outside, warm fairy lights strung around the room, magical cozy mood

lighting.name: golden hour
lighting.description: sunset light streaming in at low angle, rich warm gold tones across the room

cameraAngles: frontal — straight-on view of the wallpaper wall
corner view — shot from corner of room, two walls visible, wallpaper wall dominant
side view — shot from the side, wallpaper wall in the background

cameraDistances.name: close-up
cameraDistances.description: shows wallpaper pattern in detail plus one furniture piece, pattern texture clearly visible

cameraDistances.name: medium shot
cameraDistances.description: main furniture piece and full wallpaper wall visible, balanced composition

cameraDistances.name: wide shot
cameraDistances.description: full room view, wallpaper as backdrop, full spatial context

depthOfField.name: shallow depth of field
depthOfField.description: foreground accessory sharp, wallpaper wall softly in focus — draws eye to pattern

depthOfField.name: medium depth of field
depthOfField.description: bed and wall both sharp, slight background blur — balanced interior shot

depthOfField.name: deep depth of field
depthOfField.description: entire room sharp from foreground to wall — used for wide shots showing full context

accessories: large format nature poster (single, not gallery wall)
wooden toy train or stacking blocks
soft knit throw in muted color
ceramic plant pot with small leafy plant
woven cotton rug in warm neutral
canvas storage bin in linen fabric

germanApartmentContext.windows: large window with deep sill, typical German apartment style

negativePrompt: no beige monotony, no cold grey tones, no plastic toys, no sharp furniture corners, no visual noise, no chaos boho, no gallery walls, no full-length mirrors, no fluorescent lighting, no cluttered surfaces
